voice_group.value: Voice groups of male singers (e.g., deep vs. higher voices)
voice_group.description: Categorization of male singers by voice type (deep or higher), used as one dimension in the Chi-squared test.

sibling_sex_ratio.value: Sex ratio categories of siblings (brothers vs. sisters) for 195 singers
sibling_sex_ratio.description: Sibling sex ratio categories for each singer, used as the other dimension in the Chi-squared test to examine association with voice group.
